meta.title: National Biodefense Strategy: Implementation and Implications (Part 2)
meta.description:
Part 2 of the Blue Ribbon Study Panel on Biodefense's November 2nd conference.

Keynote remarks by the Honorable Tevi D. Troy followed by Implementation of the National Biodefense Strategy panel featuring the Honorable Rajeev Venkayya, the Honorable Curt J. Mann, and the Honorable Jeffrey W. Runge.
